requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — Kuwait KUCAS, GSO, and Project Review Context
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全证据——科威特KUCAS、GSO及项目审查背景
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全證據——科威特KUCAS、GSO及項目審查背景

summary.en: PV inverter safety evidence for Kuwait should be prepared against IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2, with attention to any GSO/GCC adoption and the current KUCAS/PAI import conformity route. IEC 62109-1 covers general safety requirements for power converters used in photovoltaic power systems, while IEC 62109-2 covers inverter-specific requirements. KUCAS/PAI and project owners may require third-party IEC type-test certificates and reports for the exact model family; MEW or the project engineer may also require IEC safety evidence as part of grid-connection documentation.
summary.zh: 科威特光伏逆变器安全证据应按IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2准备，并关注任何GSO/GCC采纳情况及当前KUCAS/PAI进口合格评定路径。IEC 62109-1规定光伏电力系统用功率变换器的一般安全要求，IEC 62109-2规定逆变器特殊要求。KUCAS/PAI和项目业主可能要求针对具体型号系列的第三方IEC型式试验证书和报告；MEW或项目工程师也可能将IEC安全证据作为并网文件的一部分要求提交。
summary.zht: 科威特光伏逆變器安全證據應按IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2準備，並關注任何GSO/GCC採納情況及當前KUCAS/PAI進口合格評定路徑。IEC 62109-1規定光伏電力系統用功率轉換器的一般安全要求，IEC 62109-2規定逆變器特殊要求。KUCAS/PAI和項目業主可能要求針對具體型號系列的第三方IEC型式試驗證書和報告；MEW或項目工程師也可能將IEC安全證據作為併網文件的一部分要求提交。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
GSO / GCC adopted IEC 62109 standards where applicable to Kuwait
KUCAS / PAI conformity handling for regulated imported products

summary.en: China's common PV inverter file often includes GB/T 37408 safety clauses, NB/T 32004 technical evidence, CQC or CGC voluntary certificates, and CNAS laboratory reports. These documents may show domestic China technical conformity, but they are not automatically equivalent to IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certification and should not be treated as Kuwait KUCAS, GSO, MEW, or project-owner acceptance evidence without an explicit equivalence decision.
summary.zh: 中国常见光伏逆变器文件通常包括GB/T 37408安全条款、NB/T 32004技术证据、CQC或CGC自愿认证以及CNAS实验室报告。这些文件可说明中国国内技术符合性，但不会自动等同于IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书；没有明确等效决定时，不应将其视为科威特KUCAS、GSO、MEW或项目业主接受证据。
summary.zht: 中國常見光伏逆變器文件通常包括GB/T 37408安全條款、NB/T 32004技術證據、CQC或CGC自願認證以及CNAS實驗室報告。這些文件可說明中國國內技術符合性，但不會自動等同於IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書；沒有明確等效決定時，不應將其視為科威特KUCAS、GSO、MEW或項目業主接受證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary PV inverter certification evidence

gap.en: Gap: Chinese safety evidence based on GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 does not by itself satisfy an IEC 62109-1/-2 safety request in Kuwait. Exporters should prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates and reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory, covering the exact model, firmware, enclosure, environmental rating, transformer or transformerless architecture, and model-family variations supplied to Kuwait. Confirm whether KUCAS/PAI requires TER/CoC support based on those IEC documents before shipment.
gap.zh: 差距：基于GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004的中国安全证据本身不能满足科威特的IEC 62109-1/-2安全要求。出口商应准备由ILAC认可实验室出具、覆盖供应科威特的具体型号、固件、外壳、环境等级、隔离或非隔离架构及型号系列差异的IEC 62109-1/-2证书和报告。出货前应确认KUCAS/PAI是否要求基于这些IEC文件办理TER/CoC支持。
gap.zht: 差距：基於GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004的中國安全證據本身不能滿足科威特的IEC 62109-1/-2安全要求。出口商應準備由ILAC認可實驗室出具、覆蓋供應科威特的具體型號、韌體、外殼、環境等級、隔離或非隔離架構及型號系列差異的IEC 62109-1/-2證書和報告。出貨前應確認KUCAS/PAI是否要求基於這些IEC文件辦理TER/CoC支持。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where KUCAS/PAI, adopted GSO/IEC standards, MEW, or the project owner requires IEC inverter safety evidence; exact statutory scope must be confirmed for the shipment and project
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or scheme-dependent in China; GB/T 37408 and NB/T 32004 evidence does not automatically transfer to Kuwait

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Plan Kuwait safety files around IEC 62109-1/-2, not only China GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004. Verify GSO/Kuwait adoption status and KUCAS/PAI TER/CoC expectations for the exact shipment, then align the IEC certificate model-family coverage with the inverter models supplied to the Kuwait project.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 科威特安全文件应围绕IEC 62109-1/-2建立，而不能仅依赖中国GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004。请核实GSO/科威特采纳状态以及具体货物的KUCAS/PAI TER/CoC预期，并使IEC证书的型号系列覆盖范围与供应科威特项目的逆变器型号一致。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 科威特安全文件應圍繞IEC 62109-1/-2建立，而不能僅依賴中國GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004。請核實GSO/科威特採納狀態以及具體貨物的KUCAS/PAI TER/CoC預期，並使IEC證書的型號系列覆蓋範圍與供應科威特項目的逆變器型號一致。
